content.description: Design mode library for app-page-view. Provides toolbar, widget wrappers with drag/resize, column overlay, and widget picker modal.

renderToolbar.name: renderToolbar
renderToolbar.description: Renders the design toolbar above the grid.

wrapWidgetForDesign.name: wrapWidgetForDesign
wrapWidgetForDesign.description: Wraps a rendered widget cell with a design overlay.

renderColumnOverlay.name: renderColumnOverlay
renderColumnOverlay.description: Renders semi-transparent column overlay lines behind the grid.

showWidgetPicker.name: showWidgetPicker
showWidgetPicker.description: Shows a two-tab modal picker: "Attach Existing" (item search) or "Create New" (tag-filtered types).
